com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair

Description
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity
 

  • Uses of ChanceAmountPair in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity

    Fields in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity with type parameters of type ChanceAmountPair
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack, ChanceAmountPair>
    Entity.customDrops
    Map for basic custom drops, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and fixed amount.
    protected Map<Map<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack, ChanceAmountPair>, Float>
    Entity.selectiveDrops
    Map for drop groups, where each group has a set chance to drop, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
